name: Fluffy Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups reduced fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the crust, combine crumbs, margarine, and sugar in a mixing bowl. Press mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie pan. Spread crumb mixture evenly in the pie pan. Chill for 1 hour, or until firm. Alternatively, bake at 375°F for 10 minutes or until edges are brown. Cool on a rack before filling.
To prepare the filling, combine cream cheese, sweetened condensed milk, peanut butter, lemon juice, and vanilla extract in a mixing bowl. Mix until smooth. Fold in the whipped topping. Pour into the crust. Chill for 4 hours or until set.
